items.name: Silent-Crypto-Miner
items.description: Silent Crypto Miner is an advanced cryptocurrency mining builder and runtime engine with multi-algorithm CPU/GPU support and intelligent resource management. Create custom mining executables with configurable algorithms, cross-platform output, real-time monitoring, session persistence, thermal throttling, scheduling, and hashrate optimization.

items.description: Compare two files or entire folders and see differences highlighted in detail. Supports text, code, images, and binary files. Ideal for developers and designers.

items.name: Crypto-Checker
items.description: Python-based crypto wallet analysis tool with multi-threaded address and seed phrase checking (up to 50 threads). Supports Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, BNB Chain, Polygon, and EVM networks. Includes proxy rotation, portfolio aggregation, USD valuation, token scanning, and TXT/CSV/JSON export for auditing, research, and analytics.

items.name: Marvel-Rivals-Menu-2026
items.description: 🎯 Marvel-Rivals-Menu – gameplay enhancement menu for Marvel Rivals. Features visual assistance, aim support, protection, movement, and more. For educational purposes only.

items.description: Unlock all abilities with unlimited red orbs, infinite Devil Trigger, and all weapons. God mode, one-hit kills, and style rank booster.

items.description: Rip and tear with unlimited ammo, health, and armor in DOOM Eternal. God mode, infinite BFG, and all weapon mods unlocked. Dominate the Hell horde.

items.name: YouTube_Content_Repurposer
items.description: Turn long-form videos into shorts, clips, and social media posts. Auto-detect key moments, add captions, and export for TikTok, Instagram, and Twitter.

items.name: AI_Desktop_Assistant__Local_LLM_Agent_
items.description: A powerful AI assistant that runs locally on your PC. Automate complex tasks: analyze files, draft emails, write code, schedule meetings, and control applications using natural language commands. No cloud dependency — full privacy.

items.name: Smart_Disk_Defragmenter___Optimizer
items.description: Defragment and optimize your hard drive using AI algorithms. Analyze usage patterns to arrange files for fastest access. Works with HDD, SSD, and NVMe drives.

items.name: Ghostwire__Tokyo_Unlimited_Ether___Health
items.description: Clear the fog with unlimited ether, health, and all abilities. God mode, one-hit kills, and unlimited items.

items.name: Focus_Keeper__Time_Tracking___Distraction_Blocker_
items.description: Track how you spend time on your PC. Block distracting websites and apps during focused work sessions. Get detailed reports on your productivity patterns.

items.name: Telegram_Scheduled_Message_Sender
items.description: Send messages to Telegram chats at specific times. Schedule birthdays, reminders, announcements, or repeated updates to groups and channels.

items.description: Advanced system restore point manager. Create, schedule, and manage restore points with custom tags and descriptions. Automatically create restore points before major changes.

items.description: Replace your Start Menu with a lightning-fast search bar. Launch apps, find files, run commands, search the web, and control system settings — all from one place. Like Spotlight for Windows.

items.name: Telegram_Channel_Auto-Poster
items.description: Automatically post content from RSS feeds, websites, or social media to your Telegram channel. Keep your channel active without manual work.

items.name: Real-Time_System_Monitor__Overlay_

items.name: Telegram_Search___Content_Indexer
items.description: Index and search across all your Telegram groups and channels. Find messages, files, and links instantly. Like a personal search engine.

items.name: Debloat___Cleaner__Advanced_Uninstaller_
items.description: Remove bloatware, pre-installed apps, and leftover files completely. Includes force uninstall, registry cleaning, and batch removal. Free up disk space and improve performance.

items.name: Final_Fantasy_XIV_Auto-Farm___Leveling_Bot
items.description: Bot for FFXIV: auto-farm mobs, complete FATEs, gather resources, and level up jobs automatically. Crafting bot and inventory manager included.

items.name: Local_AI_Document_Processor__Secure_
items.description: Process documents with AI — summarize, translate, search, and extract insights — entirely on your computer. No cloud, no privacy concerns.

items.name: Microphone___Camera_Hardware_Switch
items.description: Physically disable your microphone and webcam at the driver level. Unlike software mute, this guarantees no app can access them — prevents spyware and accidental activation.
